description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones with a modern, robust design. The ear cups are large and circular, featuring a metallic mesh grille on the exterior, likely for acoustic transparency and aesthetic appeal. The headband is thick, smoothly arched, and appears to be made of glossy black plastic, providing both durability and comfort. The ear pads are deep and cushioned, covered in a soft, matte material for extended wear. The headphones have a closed-back design, with no visible wires, suggesting a wireless or detachable cable configuration. The overall construction is sleek and professional, suitable for both casual and professional audio use in urban environments.
description: A pair of large, over-ear headphones with metallic mesh ear cups, cushioned pads, and a glossy black headband. The design is modern, robust, and likely wireless.
description_view_0: A close-up of one ear cup, showing the metallic mesh grille and part of the headband.
description_view_1: A front view displaying both ear cups, the thick cushioned pads, and the arched headband.
description_view_2: A mirrored close-up of the opposite ear cup, again highlighting the mesh grille and headband connection.
description_view_3: A direct front view of the headphones, emphasizing the symmetry and depth of the ear pads.
